title: helichrysum confertum
intro: Helichrysum confertum, also known as the yellow cudweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is valued for its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it useful for treating conditions such as eczema and acne. Helichrysum confertum is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for topical use, and its leaves can also be dried for use in teas or added to salves and creams.
